# Fixture First-Read Failure Modes

This fixture gives first-read reliability tests a stable repository shape for
unsupported language, skipped generated/vendor content, and budget-truncated
catalog evidence. Runtime freshness, degraded watcher state, and blocked
provider state are covered by adapter fakes in focused contract tests.
